medical_history.history_of_present_illness: This is a ___ year old single male with history of severe depression with psychotic features and PTSD, recently discharged from ___ who represents from group home with reported complaints of worsening depressive symptoms and possible medication nonadherence. Responds "No" to questions of suicidal or homicidal ideation. He's had ___ hospitalizations this month (1 medicine, 2 psychiatric) and was discharged at the beginning of the month on his own accord. Requested evaluations due to worsening condition and had a decline after d/c'ing haldol in favor of geodon about 2 months ago.
